description: Initial D inspired locations in FH6 Japan -- example community map, see FORMAT.md

landmarks.name: Mt. Haruna (Akina) - Community
landmarks.notes: The mountain that inspired Akina in Initial D. Fujiwara Takumi's home course. The real Mt. Haruna in Gunma has the same tight hairpin section.
landmarks.callout: Mt. Haruna. Akina. This is where it all started.

landmarks.name: Tofu Shop Starting Point
landmarks.notes: The infamous Fujiwara Tofu Shop. Takumi's father Bunta ran it. Every night Takumi would deliver tofu down Mt. Akina, developing his skills without knowing it.
landmarks.callout: The tofu shop. Every delivery run made him faster.

landmarks.name: Akagi Downhill (Myogi) - Community
landmarks.notes: Inspired by Mt. Akagi, another Initial D location. The Akagi RedSuns were Takumi's rivals in the early series.
